title: Growmeal (Fabric)
description: Unofficial Fabric Port of bl4ckscor3's Growmeal
body:
This is an unofficial Fabric port of a Forge mod called Growmeal. Growmeal adds a special version of Bone Meal that makes your crops/saplings instantly grow.

 

 

 

 

 

Original mod links:


[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/growmeal)

 

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/growmeal)
